message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["20","5","0","0"],"focus":"Boundary at Bell-comparison limit (n=20), zero concurrent_updates to force total_complexity=0 and estimated_throughput -> None, large Catalan values to test big-integer handling and performance."},{"input_lines":["1","2","0.25","1"],"focus":"Minimal non-trivial n=1: triggers 'insufficient_data' growth behavior (omit previous_value), tests remainder allocation across layers when n < num_layers, and average rounding."},{"input_lines":["3","4","0.75","3"],"focus":"More layers than nodes (num_layers>n) to exercise empty-layer handling and distribution remainder allocation, also tests derivative computation for n>=2 and second derivative null for n<3, and risk classification near thresholds."}]}
